messages.content: Write exactly 7 words. Use uppercase letters only. Use no punctuation.
CHECK DATA BEFORE TRAINING THEN REPORT STATUS

concise_solution: Seven uppercase words and no punctuation

python_asserts: assert re.fullmatch(r'[A-Z\s]+', text) is not None

contamination_audit.notes: Original manually authored item; no benchmark text used as training content.

quality_scores.reviewer_notes: quality_gate_2026_05_08_v1: ifeval_ifbench item verified with regex; correctness score 0.99 reflects available deterministic/rubric evidence. Difficulty retained as medium after curator review. Benchmark alignment and novelty scores were capped to avoid self-reported inflation; original scores were {"benchmark_alignment": 0.92, "correctness": 1.0, "instruction_clarity": 1.0, "novelty": 0.97, "thai_naturalness": 1.0}.
